result.title: Future Pro: Personal Training
result.description:
Not just an app, not just a personal trainer. Future combines the best of personal training with the flexibility to work out anytime at home, in the gym, outside or on the road.


Future matches you with one of the best personal trainers in the country who builds workouts just for you, based on your goals, your fitness level and any equipment you have access to.


WHAT YOU GET WITH FUTURE PRO:

- Unlimited access to your own personal trainer: We’ll match you with a trainer who has experience specifically with your goals. Your trainer will communicate as much as you need to keep you excited, on track, and consistent. Train all month on Future for the price of a single traditional session.

- Weekly training plan built just for you: Workouts are built just for you, and no two members have the same workouts. Rest days are just as important. Your trainer can include any activity you enjoy doing, including cardio classes, yoga, or the spontaneous hike.

- Guided workout movements: Detailed audio and video guides for each movement, with the ability to have your trainer check your form whenever needed.

- Unlimited flexibility: No more cancelation fees or workout times that don’t fit your schedule. Your trainer can also adjust your workout anytime if you’re having a busy day or if you’re on the road.

Future also integrates seamlessly with any watch that operates on Wear OS 3.0 or above such as the Google Pixel Watch and Samsung Galaxy Watch for workouts and activity monitoring, so you can keep an eye on your daily activity at a glance.


Future members achieve more than they thought was possible; that’s the fitness of Future.


Future membership is USD $199/month.


———————

Terms of Use: https://www.future.co/terms-and-conditions/

Privacy Policy: https://www.future.co/privacy/

Google Health Connect: The use of information received from Health Connect will adhere to the Health Connect Permissions Policy, including the Limited Use requirements.

• Exercise Data - Read comprehensive workout sessions from Health Connect to automatically verify workout completion across all fitness apps, create unified fitness profiles, and provide personalized coaching based on your complete exercise history.

• Step Count - Access daily step counts from all connected devices to create complete movement profiles, set personalized activity goals, and ensure no activity is missed regardless of which device recorded it.

• Weight - Read weight measurements from smart scales and health apps to provide comprehensive health tracking alongside fitness metrics, supporting weight management goals with unified data across platforms.

• Calories Burned - Access calorie expenditure data to create accurate energy balance summaries, match calories with specific exercises, and provide comprehensive nutrition insights for weight management.

• Body Sensors (Wear OS) - Access real-time heart rate during workouts on your smartwatch for immediate cardiovascular feedback, optimal training intensity, and safe exercise levels without additional devices.

• Heart Rate - Read detailed heart rate data from Health Connect to calculate personalized training zones, analyze cardiovascular patterns, and enhance imported workouts with comprehensive biometric insights.

**Why We Need This Data**
Future unifies your health data from all fitness apps and devices into one comprehensive coaching platform. This eliminates data silos, enables automatic workout tracking, and provides personalized fitness recommendations based on your complete health profile. Your data stays secure and is only used to enhance your coaching experience.

result.recentChanges: We've updated Future with some minor bug fixes and performance improvements.
